title: Surgeon Vacancy at Max Healthcare International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Max Healthcare International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Surgeon to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
